pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take:
**Gunner's sittin' pretty on top while Rafe's still tryin' to figure out if soccer's played with a round ball or a triangle.** Gunner's boys just grabbed an easy 5 points with Canada over South Africa, like he knew some secret soccer voodoo. Meanwhile, "The Noisemaker" Rafe must've thought Germany was in a different tournament 'cause his picks ain't makin' much noise. Watch out for France, folks — they're gonna dance circles 'round whoever they face next, while Gayden continues his love affair with the backpass and might actually score... against himself.

Zach's Saudi paycheck FC is still puttin' in overtime, hopin' to buy their way out of Group A, while "Ghost Pepper" Devin watches Spain try to salsa their way past the USA. Expect Spain to spice it up, though, and unleash a heat Devin would appreciate more as Sriracha than as soccer. For now, Gunner's king of the hill — but like I said, Rafe's not even sure if he's on the right field, bless his heart.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner Secures Top Spot as Devin's South Africa Falters
pundit_takes.subtitle: "Winning was the easy part," says Gunner as Devin struggles.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's World Cup Dream Slips as Germany Faces Uncertainty
pundit_takes.subtitle: Father's shadow looms large as Rafe sits at the bottom.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper's Strategic USA Pick Set to Warm the Pitch
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin banking on home advantage as USA yet to play.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Mustard Boy Tactics Leave Saudi Arabia Waiting for Miracle
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ranked fourth, Zach's hopes hinge on a tier 4 comeback.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner's sitting pretty on top, but Devin's hoping his champion odds aren't ghosted.
Rafe's Tier-1 dependency is shockingly lower than his dad's disappointment every Thanksgiving.
Rafe vs. Devin: Chaos Agent here to school Mr. Ghost Pepper with a six-point swing.
Sim can't predict a dad's nightmare; Gayden's worst-case scenario coming true in real time.
